description: Retire temporary frontend/content hardcoding and bridge logic after the v2 Korean reference/runtime surfaces became usable.

tasks.title: Inventory current hardcoded bridges and accepted temporary behavior
tasks.notes: Captured video locale fallback, Learning Library legacy i18n bridge, sync alias exclusions, shared_bank UI semantics, mapping_v2 placement, and localized dictionary core leakage.

tasks.title: Add manifest-driven supported-locale resolution
tasks.notes: Frontend slice completed in lingo-frontend-web: PipelineManifest now infers supported locales from dictionary/video/Learning Library manifests; dictionary, video, and Learning Library resolve content locale through manifest data instead of Korean-only hardcoded fallback. English UI chrome asset remains the fallback UI locale, with BOM-safe parsing.

tasks.title: Add asset integrity gates for stale layout and empty i18n regressions
tasks.notes: Frontend gates completed in test/core/asset_integrity_test.dart: rejects stale Learning Library *_index aliases except sources_index, rejects unexpected dictionary i18n root files that would indicate per-word runtime files, and enforces non-empty >=95% Learning Library sentence and video i18n coverage. Also corrected the packaged ko manifest Learning Library core paths to canonical files.

tasks.title: Move shared_bank semantics into Learning Library artifact metadata
tasks.notes: Frontend bundled artifact and mapper slice completed: shared_bank is modeled as a source with source_role=example_bank metadata, localized zh_tw label, and display flags. LearningLibrarySourceDto preserves metadata through core/i18n pack composition, Sentence Bank hides source chrome/source-browser inclusion from metadata instead of ID hardcoding, and asset integrity gates now require every sentence index source id to be modeled with aligned source i18n. Upstream content-pipeline emission should adopt the same metadata contract so future syncs do not overwrite the bundled fix.

tasks.title: Brief dictionary resolver package placement
tasks.notes: Decision brief completed: move mapping_v2/surface candidate routing out of learner-locale i18n into a target-language dictionary.resolver module, preferably packages/{target}/resolver/surface_candidates.v1.json. Core remains target lexical inventory, i18n remains learner-language display, resolver owns surface candidates/homograph/entry/sense refs plus temporary origin fallback until core-origin Phase 3 validation passes.

tasks.title: Prepare dictionary strict core/i18n split plan
tasks.notes: Plan completed: current bundled ko dictionary has 7,329/7,329 core atoms carrying definitions.zh_tw and translation.zh_tw duplicated with dict_ko_zh_tw.json. Target contract splits dictionary.core lexical inventory, dictionary.i18n learner display, and dictionary.resolver surface candidates. Plan defines forbidden core localized fields, allowed i18n fields, resolver placement, frontend migration points, pipeline slices, and validation gates.

tasks.title: Retire Learning Library legacy i18n bridge after canonical v2 sidecars exist
tasks.notes: Completed as sidecar-first default path in content-pipeline commit c2bfba7. content-ko has canonical zh_tw Learning Library sidecars under content_v2/i18n/zh_tw/learning_library; content-pipeline now reads them first and only reads legacy content/i18n behind explicit --allow-legacy-i18n-bridge. No-legacy v2 run emits 3345/3346 sentence translations; missing sent.src.ko.dialogue.a1_01.L01-D1-01 remains needs_review. Final removal of the explicit fallback is tracked by fccdr-14.

tasks.title: Define and enforce source-of-truth lookup policy
tasks.notes: Defines runtime truth tables, legacy quarantine rules, agent lookup order, and gate recommendations to prevent frontend work from accidentally attaching to old data or old schemas.

tasks.title: Add versioned content contract registry and Learning Library runtime validator
tasks.notes: Adds learning_library.package.v1 and manifest.package.v1 schemas plus an executable standard-library validator for runtime manifest shape, deprecated alias rejection, referenced-file existence, locale presence, and sentence i18n baseline coverage.

tasks.title: Split display POS from backend POS composition in atom/runtime DTOs
tasks.notes: Migration brief completed. Current bundled assets expose 54 unique video atom pos values and 158 unique Sentence Bank atom pos values, including Korean chunk composition chains such as adj+e+e, v+e, n+cop+e. The plan explicitly preserves + composition and composite ids; it adds learner-facing display_pos_key plus an automated composition-to-display mapping table, with only unknown/ambiguous mappings sent to review. Validators should reject composition strings in display_pos_key, not reject composition itself.

tasks.title: Neutralize Learning Library frontend field names for multilingual content
tasks.notes: Pre-launch direct cleanup: Learning Library domain models, DTOs, mapper, reference UI, seed fixtures, and tests now use surface/translation/title/summary instead of surfaceKo/translationZhTw/titleZhTw/summaryZhTw. Deprecated field names are intentionally not supported as runtime fallbacks.

tasks.title: Prepare frontend dictionary resolver module loading
tasks.notes: Frontend now prefers future dictionary.resolver surface candidate packages when present (surface_candidates.v1.json, mapping_v2.json, or surface_mapping_v2.json) and falls back to current i18n mapping_v2/mapping until content-pipeline emits the resolver package. Validated with manifest, repository, dictionary service, and asset integrity tests.

tasks.title: Add Learning Library canonical sidecar and legacy bridge quarantine gates
tasks.notes: Release-side gate added for learning_library.i18n_sidecar.v1 sidecars and content-pipeline legacy bridge quarantine. The sidecar gate validates manifest-listed sources/sentences/knowledge files, source_id/sentence_id/knowledge_id key alignment, active translation non-emptiness, turn_id on turn-based rows, and minimum sentence coverage. The bridge gate supports allow/flagged/forbid modes so content-pipeline can cut over to canonical sidecars first and then retire legacy reads.

tasks.title: Remove explicit Learning Library legacy i18n fallback and pass forbid gate
tasks.notes: Follow-up after one validation slice: remove --allow-legacy-i18n-bridge and legacy helper symbols from content-pipeline once synced frontend output is confirmed. Release gate must pass with --legacy-learning-library-bridge-policy forbid.
